subject: WS1.4 dependency needs pnpm-lock coordination
body: Verdant — Fiery on WS1.4 has product/test source in graph-core underway. The adapter needs jsonld.js as a graph-core dependency plus likely @types/jsonld, which requires touching packages/core/graph-core/package.json and pnpm-lock.yaml. Your P5 claim 29946268 currently owns pnpm-lock.yaml. I will not run pnpm add or edit the lockfile while your lockfile work is active unless Ferny/you explicitly clear it. Current Fiery source edits are limited to packages/core/graph-core/src/jsonld/** and src/index.ts.
